head_1.s: -15% FP cost incantations, +10% damage taken from spells

head_2.s: -15% FP cost sorceries, +10% damage taken from spells

head_10.s: +10% attack power on bleed proc nearby

head_11.s: +10% attack power on rot proc nearby

hp.source: CalcCorrect curve from verified breakpoints: VIG 1=300, 25=800, 40=1450, 60=1900, 99=2100

fp.source: CalcCorrect curve from verified breakpoints. Soft caps at 35-40 and 55-60.

stamina.source: CalcCorrect curve. Soft caps at 15/30/50. Gains minimal past 50.

discovery.source: Linear: 100 + ARC. Verified in-game 2026-04-19 (B19 fix). Fextralife confirms.

greatRunes.name: Malenia's Great Rune
greatRunes.note: HP recovery on hit after damage

incantations.name: Fire Serpent
incantations.notes: DLC — fast, low FP, high damage. Primary spam spell.

incantations.name: Honed Bolt
incantations.notes: Targeted bolt — hits anywhere on screen

incantations.name: Elden Stars
incantations.notes: Massive holy barrage — slow but damaging

incantations.name: Multilayered Ring of Light
incantations.notes: DLC holy disc — passes through enemies

incantations.name: Black Blade
incantations.notes: % HP cap reduction — devastating on bosses

sorceries.name: Comet Azur
sorceries.notes: Sustained beam — Cerulean Hidden Tear combo

sorceries.name: Carian Slicer
sorceries.notes: Fast melee-range — best DPS per FP
